items.title: Cloudflare adds per-Worker caching
items.oneliner: Tiered cache for Workers serves fresh responses without execution, cutting CPU cost with Cache-Control and programmatic purges.

items.title: MDN ships practical web security docs
items.oneliner: Hands-on MDN security guides cover attacks, defenses, threat modeling, and auth choices developers can apply immediately.

items.title: Elm compiler gets much faster
items.oneliner: Elm 0.19.2 cuts incremental builds under 350ms and compiles 850k lines in 5.7 seconds.

items.title: Terminal client for Jellyfin servers
items.oneliner: Rust TUI streams Jellyfin and Subsonic media with instant search, local playback, Chromecast, and UPnP support.

items.title: Peer to peer web publishing CLI
items.oneliner: This CLI publishes and browses offline websites as portable files, without DNS, hosting, or centralized infrastructure.

items.title: Open source browser game platform
items.oneliner: Build, test, and self-host multiplayer browser games with a live editor and no registration required.

items.title: Practical guide to public IDs
items.oneliner: Clear comparison of UUIDs, ULIDs, and Sqids explains sorting, database tradeoffs, and security implications for production systems.

items.title: Webmentions for static sites
items.oneliner: Step by step tutorial shows how to add Webmention support to a static site using simple HTML and Webmention.io.

items.title: Run Windows 2000 on Alpha
items.oneliner: New es40 fork adds JIT speedups and updated graphics so you can emulate DEC Alpha and boot Windows 2000.

items.title: Genomics primer for engineers
items.oneliner: Engineer friendly genomics course explains cells, DNA, chromosomes, and cancer biology with implementation minded clarity.
